Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Spirit Well]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — The Spirit Well is blue as a summer sky.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — The Spirit Well promotes growth in the soul and increases madra density.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 11''' — The Spirit Well is a destination that can restore madra with a single sip.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 12''' — The Spirit Well is a location that Ziel headed towards.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 12''' — The Spirit Well is at least ten times bigger than the Dream Well and resembles a pond.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 13''' — The Spirit Well is described as an endless spring of power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 13''' — The Spirit Well is a location where Lindon trains.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — The Spirit Well water has miraculous properties that aid advancement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — The Spirit Well failed to work for Ziel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — A single cup from the Spirit Well cost a fortune.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 16''' — The Spirit Well contains water that guides Orthos' power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 19''' — The oracle was raised to Truegold thanks to his Spirit Well.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon has cycled the power of the Spirit Well to Dross before.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
